numeric_threshold_region_count: Using the value legend, how many {region_noun} are {threshold_phrase}?
What number of {region_noun} fall in value bins {threshold_phrase}?
From the map legend, count {region_noun} whose values are {threshold_phrase}.
numeric_interval_region_count: Using the value legend, how many {region_noun} are {interval_phrase}?
What number of {region_noun} fall in value bins {interval_phrase}?
From the map legend, count {region_noun} whose values are {interval_phrase}.
categorical_region_count: How many {region_noun} are in the "{category_label}" category?
Using the category legend, how many {region_noun} fall under "{category_label}"?
What number of {region_noun} match the category "{category_label}"?
From the map legend, count {region_noun} in category "{category_label}".
named_region_set_total_value: For "{region_set_name}" ({region_set_label_list}), what is the total of the visible integer values?
Sum the visible values for the "{region_set_name}" regions: {region_set_label_list}.
Using the visible region labels, what is the combined value for "{region_set_name}": {region_set_label_list}?
What total do you get after adding the visible values for "{region_set_name}" ({region_set_label_list})?
Add the integer values printed in regions {region_set_label_list} for "{region_set_name}".
group_category_region_count: Among the visible colored {region_noun} in "{continent_label}", how many are in the "{category_label}" category?
Count the visible colored {region_noun} located in "{continent_label}" and assigned to "{category_label}".
Using the world map and category legend, how many visible colored {region_noun} in "{continent_label}" fall under "{category_label}"?
What number of visible colored {region_noun} are both in "{continent_label}" and in category "{category_label}"?
From the map legend, count visible colored {region_noun} in "{continent_label}" with category "{category_label}".
adjacent_same_category_count: How many colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner have the same category as region "{reference_region_label}"?
Count the colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner that share its category.
Using the category legend, how many edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} match region "{reference_region_label}"?
What number of colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner are in the same category?
From the map, count edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} with the same category as region "{reference_region_label}".
adjacent_category_count: How many colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner are in the "{category_label}" category?
Count the colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner that are assigned to "{category_label}".
Using the category legend, how many edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" fall under "{category_label}"?
What number of colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner match category "{category_label}"?
From the map legend, count edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" in category "{category_label}".
adjacent_numeric_threshold_count: How many colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner have values {threshold_phrase}?
Count the colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner with values {threshold_phrase}.
Using the value legend, how many edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" are {threshold_phrase}?
What number of colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" by edge or corner fall in value bins {threshold_phrase}?
From the map legend, count edge-or-corner neighboring colored {region_noun} touching region "{reference_region_label}" whose values are {threshold_phrase}.
marker_region_threshold_count: Count the {region_noun} whose marker bubbles encode values {threshold_phrase}.
Using the marker bubbles, how many {region_noun} have values {threshold_phrase}?
What number of {region_noun} have marker-encoded values {threshold_phrase}?
From the marker layer, count {region_noun} with values {threshold_phrase}.
marker_region_extremum_label: Which visible region label has the {extremum_word} marker value?
Using the marker bubbles, report the label with the {extremum_word} value.
What is the visible label whose marker bubble encodes the {extremum_word} value?
Find the map label with the {extremum_word} marker value and return that label.
From the marker layer, which visible label has the {extremum_word} value?

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Required answer format: {answer_hint}.

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

{json_example}

query:numeric_threshold_region_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:numeric_threshold_region_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the counted regions

query:numeric_interval_region_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:numeric_interval_region_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the counted regions

query:categorical_region_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:categorical_region_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the counted regions

query:named_region_set_total_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested total as an integer
query:named_region_set_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the regions included in the total

query:group_category_region_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:group_category_region_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the counted regions

query:adjacent_same_category_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:adjacent_same_category_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for the counted neighboring regions

query:adjacent_category_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:adjacent_category_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for the counted neighboring regions

query:adjacent_numeric_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:adjacent_numeric_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for the counted neighboring regions

query:marker_region_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested number of regions as an integer
query:marker_region_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points, one at the center of each counted marker bubble

query:marker_region_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible region label as a string
query:marker_region_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the answer marker bubble
